name: driftconditions
description: *DriftConditions* is an online audio source that captures the chaos and serendipity of late-night radio tuning in an uncanny audio stream generated on the fly by code. Overlapping fragmented stories, ambient sounds, and mysterious crosstalk weave a vivid sonic tapestry that draws listeners into an immersive and unpredictable listening experience. Inspired by the unpredictability of real-world radio interference, *DriftConditions* explores the boundaries between intention and happenstance, inviting listeners to eavesdrop on a hidden world of voices and atmospheres unconstrained by traditional narrative structures. Each new listening session offers a fresh journey through its evocative auditory landscape.
